subjects.description: red barn beside golden hour cornfields
subjects.appearance_details: weathered red siding, white trim, dark roofline, warm sunset rim light, simple farm structure standing tall near fields
subjects.relationship: central farm landmark anchoring the rural sunset scene
subjects.location: middle ground slightly right of center near the corn rows
subjects.relative_size: medium, larger than the cows but smaller than the fields and sky
subjects.orientation: front and side walls angled toward the winding road
subjects.action: remains still as warm light slides across the siding
subjects.state_changes: red walls deepen in color as the sun lowers
subjects.skin_tone_and_texture: painted wood siding with subtle grain and weathering

subjects.description: grazing cows silhouetted in the field
subjects.appearance_details: dark cow shapes with soft edge light, lowered heads, slow tail movement, small highlights on backs
subjects.relationship: living farm presence within the sunset pasture
subjects.location: middle distance across the field near the barn
subjects.relative_size: small against the broad farm landscape
subjects.orientation: varied, mostly side facing while grazing
subjects.pose: standing with heads lowered toward grass
subjects.action: graze slowly and shift weight in place
subjects.state_changes: silhouettes grow darker as the sky brightens behind them
subjects.skin_tone_and_texture: dark silhouetted hides with faint warm highlights

subjects.description: lone autumn tree beside a wooden fence
subjects.appearance_details: branching silhouette with orange and red leaves, textured trunk, leaves flickering in the breeze
subjects.relationship: adds color and scale near the road and fence
subjects.location: foreground to left middle ground near the dirt road
subjects.relative_size: medium vertical accent in the farm scene
subjects.action: leaves tremble lightly in the evening breeze
subjects.state_changes: leaf edges glow brighter as the camera angle catches the sun
subjects.skin_tone_and_texture: rough bark and dry autumn leaves

background_setting: picturesque farm with rows of corn stretching to the horizon, a red barn, grazing cows, a lone autumn tree, a dirt road, and a quaint wooden fence under orange pink purple sunset sky
